_about: HELD-OUT external-validity set for §12.6. Constructed AFTER the triage rules were frozen, with subjects/values disjoint from the 71-pair eval-set (no item reused). Positives mix fresh curated conflicts with data-driven LongMemEval_S knowledge-update changes NOT used in the 71-set (Luna 6→9 months = e61a7584; tennis weekly→biweekly = f685340e). Negatives are fresh. expectedLane = human-correct routing. Caveat: built by the same author who knows the rules, so this is held-out *instances* under frozen rules, not third-party-blind construction — a stronger external test would be a reviewer-supplied set.

items.snippetA: I have had my cat Luna for 6 months.
items.snippetB: I have had my cat Luna for 9 months now.

items.snippetA: Vega Corporation is headquartered in Lisbon.
items.snippetB: Vega Corporation is headquartered in Porto.

items.snippetA: Project Mercury is led by Diana Voss.
items.snippetB: Project Mercury is led by Karl Reinholt.

items.snippetA: Renata Soto's team manages 12 retail stores.
items.snippetB: Renata Soto's team manages 15 retail stores.

items.snippetA: The Pulsar service runs on Redis.
items.snippetB: The Pulsar service runs on Memcached.

items.snippetA: Maxwell Industries employs 240 people.
items.snippetB: Maxwell Industries employs 310 people.

items.snippetA: The Aurora plan costs 49 dollars a month.
items.snippetB: The Aurora plan costs 79 dollars a month.

items.snippetA: My reading list has 14 books.
items.snippetB: My reading list now has 19 books.

items.snippetA: I am a non-smoker.
items.snippetB: I am not a non-smoker anymore.

items.snippetA: I'm based in Nairobi.
items.snippetB: I'm based in Mombasa.

items.snippetA: I play tennis with my friends at the local park every week.
items.snippetB: I now play tennis with my friends at the local park every other week.

items.snippetA: In 2019, Vega Corporation employed 80 people.
items.snippetB: In 2024, Vega Corporation employed 300 people.

items.snippetA: Back in 2020, Diana Voss was based in Lisbon.
items.snippetB: Since 2023, Diana Voss has been based in Berlin.

items.snippetA: Pulsar Gateway's documented timeout is 30 seconds.
items.snippetB: Pulsar Gateway's documented timeout is 60 seconds.

items.snippetA: Maxwell Industries does not operate in Africa.
items.snippetB: Maxwell Industries has never operated anywhere in Africa.

items.snippetA: The Mercury Programme is not delayed in any way.
items.snippetB: The Mercury Programme has never been delayed at all.

items.snippetA: Project Mercury is led by Diana Voss, who owns delivery.
items.snippetB: Diana Voss is the lead of Project Mercury and owns its delivery.

items.snippetA: The 2025 budget review is on Tuesday.
items.snippetB: The 2025 company offsite is in September.

items.snippetA: I paid 30 dollars for the monthly parking permit.
items.snippetB: The 30 dollar lunch downtown was excellent.

items.snippetA: Renata Soto enjoys pottery on weekends.
items.snippetB: The Pulsar service backup runs at 2 am.

items.snippetA: Maxwell Industries sponsors a local football team.
items.snippetB: My favorite tea is jasmine green.

items.snippetA: Vega Corporation has 80 engineers.
items.snippetB: Vega Corporation has 300 clients.

items.snippetA: Maxwell Industries has 240 employees.
items.snippetB: Maxwell Industries has 12 office locations.

items.snippetA: The Riverside clinic is about 2 miles from downtown.
items.snippetB: The Riverside clinic requires an appointment booked ahead.
